text.message: Well he gave you the game

u have space to do stuff with first pick

i have one tile of sheep, im blockable

and i will get a lot of shared blocks on the 8 ore and 5 wheat and in normal games even 6 wheat

its a high production board with outer desert space and some very particular distance properties

when i get table talked like that ofc im going for production over pacing

idk its securing my progress imo
